娇软小姑娘，可惜字数不够，攒着慢慢看，大大加油更新呀","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":15,"text":"大反派","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%8F%8D%E6%B4%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743210631DD3AAD6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227180739795914654498%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227121685400522853415%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%8F%8D%E6%B4%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671896373,"group_id":"7121685400522853415","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9dIW/bMZGQZ0AbVFEJBn8I=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/17ebcf243ec347a482bc1e76fc49aa5a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877604&x-signature=zpYBQD3cq%2BgBoOHMz1ZHrt%2F8gYY%3D","user_id":"55136373468","user_name":"微清愁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"55136373468","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7121685400522853415","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1，男女主双洁，偏执疯批大反派VS娇软嘴甜小神算】
　　意外穿书成了一个炮灰女配，叶槿舒无语问苍天，原主作天作地嫌命太长，导致她一穿过来，就已经得罪了书中男女主，三个哥哥也对她爱答不理。
　　在一次被男主派人侵害时，叶槿舒碰上了书中的偏执大反派。
　　江承珏嘴角挂着轻微的冷笑，跟瘫软在地上的叶槿舒平视，“想要我救你？”
　　叶槿舒拼命点头，手指死死抓着对方的衣角。
　　【宿主，对方黑暗值达到了90％，请您做好心理准备。】
　　叶槿舒：“……”
　　“只是我这个人不做没有利益的事情，救了你，你能给我什么好处？”
　　叶槿舒手足无措，紧紧抓住男人的衣角，“只要你救我，我以后都听你的话，你让我做什么，我都听。”她努力伪装乖巧。
　　男人的眸子闪过几分晦暗不明的光，“记住你现在说的话。”
　　……
　　后来，江承珏还有她三个哥哥，将叶槿舒宠上天！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a9f94ce6b2f9e907a82cbff3fbca0080~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"苏九芩","author_id":"","book_id":"7121685400522853415","book_name":"穿书后我被禁欲反派给亲懵了","book_short_name":"烙吻眉心","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3989人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7121685948026323470","read_count":"3989","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"576718"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"308","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,系统,总裁,宠妻,穿越,团宠,甜宠,穿书,豪门世家,大佬,双洁,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e49606ba235b64e7fd130c35ae05d91a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779505063&x-signature=NZm9%2FRR0UHUpSR6JZUSiK2xhUS4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4406445265126478","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.416575e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324105743867F96E05A1A1DD3AAD6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":16831},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1672416131,"author_reply_time":1671896818,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7250804413832364855","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是真的真的很好看，我以前从来都不看这些小说的，但我就只看过这一本书，是真的真的惊艳了我很久很久，我永远都忘不了这本书！！！我就想问作者，这本书完结了之后那在二哥和三哥这些书里面有叶槿舒和江承珏吗？在这些书里面叶槿舒的二哥和三哥还会再宠叶槿舒吗？她的二哥和三哥自从有了女朋友后都没怎么理叶槿舒了，都没怎么宠叶槿舒了，我想让她二哥三哥每天都宠着叶槿舒，可以吗？这本书真的很好看！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688209579,"group_id":"7121685400522853415","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"515015712708140"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7121685400522853415","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.28386669e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读36小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":128386,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":24},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7250712467269337893","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看很好看，这本书是真的真的惊艳了我好久好久的，这本书我真的真的永远都不会忘记，但是我想让作者继续写叶槿舒她的三个哥哥们，不想让她的三个哥哥们谈恋爱，因为谈了恋爱她的三个哥哥们就都没理叶槿舒了，都没宠叶槿舒了，我只想让她的三个哥哥们只宠叶槿舒一个人，就是不想让她的三个哥哥们谈恋爱，我想让作者这样写！！！因为这本书真的真的惊艳了我很久很久，我想让作者这样写！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688188176,"group_id":"7121685400522853415","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1UzLDIHiFsyE2moXljbcbk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0552636531d34fbfaaedd98d6140b76f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883087&x-signature=B%2FDg7UvlD5RG%2FTWzMQgPlq0I4Vg%3D","user_id":"515015712708140","user_name":"Caeins."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"515015712708140","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7121685400522853415","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1，男女主双洁，偏执疯批大反派VS娇软嘴甜小神算】

egoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7121685948026323470","read_count":"3989","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"576718"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"308","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,系统,总裁,宠妻,穿越,团宠,甜宠,穿书,豪门世家,大佬,双洁,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e49606ba235b64e7fd130c35ae05d91a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779505063&x-signature=NZm9%2FRR0UHUpSR6JZUSiK2xhUS4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4406445265126478","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.25311592e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324105743867F96E05A1A1DD3AAD6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读35小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":125311,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7516},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1688354131,"author_reply_time":1688354137,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7184894540527616828","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"OMG，这本书简直就是戳到我的心巴上了！！！！！好喜欢，最近看书总是动不动就弃文，但这本书我一口气看完了，斯哈，太上瘾了，超级喜欢偏执反派大佬江承珏！！！自称“爷”痞帅！！而且喜欢就上，行动能力强，想见他老婆叶槿舒，话不多说，哎嘿，闪现！一见他老婆就想亲亲，他老婆生日还送大钻石，很难不爱，但他老婆叶槿舒和她二哥去外面过生日了，他就躲在他老婆的房间里面，他老婆一进房间，就把人家按在墙上，把双手扣住压在头顶，醋意满满的质问叶槿舒去哪了，哇！！看到这一整个激动住！！看的正上头，再往下翻，映入眼帘的是屎黄色按钮，呜，真的会哭死，正上瘾呢，然后告诉我没有了，作者真是卡的一手好文
喜欢这种题材的姐妹不要错过！！！.尊的很好看！从感叹号就知道我有多喜欢！！！
最后
祝作者的作品大红大紫，越来越多人喜欢，在创作之路上畅通无阻，么么
女人你成功引起我的注意，火速嫁给我！！[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672864391,"group_id":"7121685400522853415","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"是个整天想摆烂的码字人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3/YsHzpAoahbxuySuNxL0oSZQ7cF2SkueVxH20XEOqt","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c01bd9f44ead4b3387049ba1e6fb819a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878280&x-signature=0I8lSapgRt6SlPhigbKFYRhjXqc%3D","user_id":"2981464095340269","user_name":"鲩語浔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2981464095340269","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7121685400522853415","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1，男女主双洁，偏执疯批大反派VS娇软嘴甜小神算】

　　在一次被男主派人侵害时，叶槿舒碰上了书中的偏执大反派。
　　江承珏嘴角挂着轻微的冷笑，跟瘫软在地上的叶槿舒平视，“想要我救你？”

　　叶槿舒：“……”
　　“只是我这个人不做没有利益的事情，救了你，你能给我什么好处？”
　　叶槿舒手足无措，紧紧抓住男人的衣角，“只要你救我，我以后都听你的话，你让我做什么，我都听。”她努力伪装乖巧。
　　男人的眸子闪过几分晦暗不明的光，“记住你现在说的话。”
　　……
